parking_lot_small.default: A small surface parking lot. The painted lines are faded and the asphalt cracked.

state.good: A well-maintained parking lot with freshly painted lines.
state.normal: An ordinary surface parking lot. Cars come and go.
state.bad: A run-down lot full of potholes and faded markings.

parking_lot_large.default: A wide open parking lot stretching across the block.

state.good: A large, well-organised parking lot with clear signage.
state.normal: A busy parking lot where you search for a spot.
state.bad: A sprawling, neglected lot riddled with cracks and litter.

state.good: A clean, well-lit parking garage with smooth ramps.
state.normal: A functional parking garage. The fluorescent lights flicker occasionally.
state.bad: A gloomy parking garage with graffiti on every level.

state.good: A modern parking garage with electronic space indicators.
state.normal: A busy parking garage. You navigate its winding ramps with care.
state.bad: A dilapidated parking garage. Half the lights are out.

convenience_store.default: A convenience store with everything you need in a pinch.

time.morning: The morning crowd grabs coffee and newspapers.
time.evening: After-work shoppers browse the aisles.
time.night: A late-night run for snacks and essentials.

state.good: A bright, well-stocked convenience store with friendly staff.
state.normal: A typical convenience store. The shelves are reasonably full.
state.bad: A dingy store with sparse shelves and a sticky floor.

gas_station.default: A gas station with pumps and a small shop.

time.morning: Commuters queue at the pumps in the early morning rush.
time.evening: Drivers stop to refuel on their way home.
time.night: The gas station glows brightly against the dark street.

state.good: A modern gas station with working pumps and a clean shop.
state.normal: A standard gas station. The pumps are functional.
state.bad: An aging gas station. A few pumps are taped off with 'OUT OF ORDER' signs.

fast_food_restaurant.default: The smell of frying food hits you as you walk in.

time.morning: The breakfast crowd fills every table.
time.afternoon: Lunchtime rush — every counter is busy.
time.evening: The evening crowd is light but steady.
time.night: A handful of night owls linger over their meals.

state.good: A clean, modern fast food outlet with friendly service.
state.normal: A typical fast food restaurant. The line moves quickly.
state.bad: A tired fast food outlet. The tables are sticky and the floor unswept.

coffee_shop.default: The rich aroma of freshly ground coffee fills the air.

time.morning: The morning rush — a long line of caffeine-seekers.
time.afternoon: A relaxed afternoon crowd types away on laptops.
time.evening: A quieter evening crowd nurses their drinks.
time.night: Only a few late-nighters remain, nursing their cups.

state.good: A cosy, well-maintained coffee shop with excellent drinks.
state.normal: A pleasant coffee shop. The baristas are competent and friendly.
state.bad: A worn coffee shop. The espresso machine gurgles ominously.

small_retail_store.default: A small retail shop stocked with everyday goods.

state.good: A tidy little shop with well-arranged merchandise.
state.normal: A modest retail store. The selection is limited but adequate.
state.bad: A shabby store with half-empty shelves and faded price tags.

pharmacy.default: A pharmacy lined with medicines, vitamins, and health products.

time.morning: The pharmacy opens to a stream of early customers.
time.afternoon: A steady flow of customers picking up prescriptions.
time.evening: The evening rush — people collecting their prescriptions after work.

state.good: A clean, well-stocked pharmacy with knowledgeable staff.
state.normal: A standard pharmacy. The pharmacist is helpful.
state.bad: A cramped pharmacy with a long queue and sparse stock.

bank_branch.default: A bank branch with tellers behind a marble counter.

time.morning: The bank has just opened. A few early customers wait.
time.afternoon: The lunch crowd handles their banking needs.
time.evening: The branch is quieting down before closing time.

state.good: A well-appointed bank branch with fast, professional service.
state.normal: A standard bank branch. The queue moves at a steady pace.
state.bad: A run-down branch. The ATM is taped off and the wait is long.

laundromat.default: The hum of washing machines fills the warm, soapy air.

time.morning: A handful of early birds load their machines.
time.afternoon: People scroll their phones while waiting for their laundry.
time.evening: The evening crowd brings bags of washing.
time.night: A quiet night-time shift — just a few machines spinning.

state.good: A clean laundromat with modern machines and plenty of detergent.
state.normal: A typical laundromat. The machines work reliably enough.
state.bad: A grim laundromat. Half the machines are broken, the rest wobble noisily.

hair_salon.default: The snip of scissors and the hum of blow-dryers greet you.

gender.male: The barber spins a chair toward you with a confident nod.
gender.female: The stylist greets you warmly and gestures you to a seat.

state.good: A smart salon with stylish décor and skilled stylists.
state.normal: A pleasant enough salon. The stylists are friendly and competent.
state.bad: A faded salon. The mirrors are spotted and the chairs worn.

gym_fitness_center.default: The familiar smell of rubber mats and exertion fills the air.

time.morning: Early-morning regulars fill every machine.
time.afternoon: A moderate afternoon crowd works through their routines.
time.evening: The after-work rush — every bench is occupied.
time.night: A quiet late-night session. You have most of the gym to yourself.

attribute.STRENGTH: You feel right at home among the weights.
attribute.STAMINA: Your endurance has you breezing through warm-ups others struggle with.

state.good: A well-equipped gym with clean facilities and attentive staff.
state.normal: A solid gym. The equipment is functional and the floors are clean enough.
state.bad: A worn-down gym. Several machines have 'out of order' signs. The floor mats are cracked.

medical_clinic.default: A clean medical clinic with a quiet waiting room.

time.morning: The morning appointment rush fills the waiting area.
time.afternoon: A steady flow of patients moves through the clinic.
time.evening: The last patients of the day are being seen.

state.good: A well-run clinic with attentive staff and short wait times.
state.normal: A standard clinic. The wait is reasonable and the staff professional.
state.bad: An overstretched clinic. The waiting room is packed and staff look exhausted.

dental_office.default: The faint smell of antiseptic and the sound of drills greet you.

state.good: A modern dental office with up-to-date equipment and gentle staff.
state.normal: A competent dental practice. Nothing fancy, but reliable.
state.bad: A dated dental office. The equipment looks older than you'd like.

veterinary_clinic.default: Animals of all kinds wait patiently with their owners.

state.good: A well-staffed vet clinic with caring, knowledgeable veterinarians.
state.normal: A standard vet practice. The staff are friendly with animals.
state.bad: A busy vet clinic with a long wait and cramped exam rooms.

daycare_center.default: The cheerful sound of children playing fills the air.

time.morning: Parents drop off their little ones, the place bursting with energy.
time.afternoon: Nap time — the center is a little quieter.
time.evening: Parents collect their children, the day winding down.

state.good: A bright, well-run daycare with engaged, caring staff.
state.normal: A decent daycare. The children look happy and occupied.
state.bad: A tired-looking daycare. The toys are worn and the paint peeling.

elementary_school.default: A school humming with the energy of young learners.

time.morning: Children stream through the gates as the first bell rings.
time.afternoon: The school day is in full swing.
time.evening: The school is quiet and mostly empty after hours.

state.good: A well-maintained school with dedicated teachers and happy students.
state.normal: A solid public school doing its best with limited resources.
state.bad: A struggling school. The building shows its age and the staff look worn.

high_school.default: Teenagers move through the halls between classes.

time.morning: Students shuffle in, backpacks heavy, faces half-asleep.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime crowd spills out onto the steps.
time.evening: After-school clubs and sports practice fill the grounds.

state.good: A well-resourced high school with strong academics and active clubs.
state.normal: A typical high school navigating the usual challenges.
state.bad: An underfunded high school. Textbooks are old and the facility run-down.

community_college.default: Adult learners and recent graduates fill the lecture halls.

time.morning: Morning classes are filling up.
time.afternoon: A mix of day and evening students populate the campus.
time.evening: Evening classes draw working adults continuing their education.

state.good: A well-regarded community college with strong vocational programmes.
state.normal: A practical community college offering a broad range of courses.
state.bad: An underfunded college. Some labs lack proper equipment.

fire_station.default: The gleaming fire trucks stand ready behind open bay doors.

time.morning: The day shift is briefing around the vehicles.
time.evening: The night crew is taking over from the day shift.

state.good: A well-equipped fire station with modern trucks and well-trained crews.
state.normal: A solid fire station keeping the neighbourhood safe.
state.bad: An aging fire station. The equipment is functional but clearly dated.

police_station.default: Officers move in and out through the reinforced doors.

time.morning: The morning shift change brings a flurry of activity.
time.evening: The evening briefing fills the muster room.
time.night: The night desk is busy with calls and paperwork.

state.good: A well-staffed station with professional, community-focused officers.
state.normal: A busy station working through the demands of the precinct.
state.bad: An overstretched station. The morale looks low and the paperwork piled high.

prison.default: The imposing concrete walls loom over the surrounding street.

state.good: A secure, well-managed facility by the looks of it.
state.normal: A functioning correctional facility. Guards move in measured patrols.
state.bad: A grim facility showing its age. The tension in the air is palpable.

post_office.default: A queue snakes toward the service counter.

time.morning: The morning rush brings a long line of package-senders.
time.afternoon: A moderate afternoon crowd handles their postal needs.
time.evening: The post office is winding down for the day.

state.good: A well-organised post office with fast, friendly service.
state.normal: A standard post office. The line moves at a workmanlike pace.
state.bad: A slow, understaffed post office. The queue barely moves.

library.default: Rows of shelves stretch into the quiet interior.

time.morning: A few early readers browse the stacks.
time.afternoon: Students occupy every available study table.
time.evening: The evening crowd trickles in for research and reading.
time.night: The library closes its doors; only the security lighting remains.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You scan the shelves with practised ease, already knowing what to look for.
attribute.MEMORY: The organised catalogue feels intuitive to you.

state.good: A well-funded library with extensive collections and helpful librarians.
state.normal: A solid public library serving the community's reading needs.
state.bad: An underfunded library. Many shelves are empty and the computers dated.

community_center.default: A multipurpose hall humming with classes and community events.

time.morning: Morning fitness classes are in full swing.
time.afternoon: After-school programmes bring children flooding in.
time.evening: Evening community meetings and social events fill the rooms.

state.good: A vibrant, well-maintained community hub.
state.normal: A functional community center serving the local neighbourhood.
state.bad: A worn-down center. The ceiling tiles are stained and the floor scratched.

city_hall.default: The halls of local government bustle with officials and citizens.

time.morning: Morning petitioners line up outside the offices.
time.afternoon: Council chambers echo with afternoon debates.
time.evening: The building quiets as staff head home for the day.

state.good: A well-run city hall with efficient public services.
state.normal: A functioning city hall processing permits, licences, and complaints.
state.bad: A bureaucratic maze. The queues are long and the staff harried.

courthouse.default: Lawyers, plaintiffs, and defendants fill the marble corridors.

time.morning: Morning hearings draw crowds of observers and families.
time.afternoon: Afternoon sessions continue the day's proceedings.
time.evening: The courts are clearing for the day.

state.good: An imposing but efficiently run courthouse.
state.normal: A busy courthouse working through its crowded docket.
state.bad: An overloaded courthouse. Cases are delayed and the system strained.

small_apartment_building.default: A modest residential building housing a handful of families.

state.good: A well-maintained apartment building with a tidy lobby.
state.normal: A decent apartment block. The hallways are clean enough.
state.bad: A neglected building. The intercom is broken and the lifts unreliable.

medium_apartment_building.default: A mid-rise apartment building with a busy lobby.

state.good: A well-managed apartment complex with attentive building management.
state.normal: A solid apartment building serving its tenants adequately.
state.bad: A tired apartment building in need of renovation.

large_apartment_building.default: A large apartment block towering over the street.

state.good: A well-kept high-density apartment complex.
state.normal: A standard large apartment block. The corridors are busy.
state.bad: A run-down high-rise with persistent maintenance issues.

luxury_apartment_tower.default: A gleaming residential tower with a uniformed doorman.

attribute.CHARISMA: You blend in naturally with the well-dressed residents.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Every detail of the upscale décor registers with you.

state.good: An immaculate luxury tower with concierge service and premium amenities.
state.normal: A high-end residential tower living up to most of its promises.
state.bad: A luxury tower that has seen better days. The veneer of exclusivity is fading.

highrise_apartment_complex.default: A soaring residential complex of connected towers.

state.good: A well-run high-rise complex with excellent facilities.
state.normal: A busy residential complex serving hundreds of tenants.
state.bad: An aging complex. The lifts break down regularly and the management is slow to respond.

townhouse_row.default: A row of identical terraced houses lining a quiet street.

state.good: A well-maintained row of townhouses with tidy front gardens.
state.normal: A pleasant townhouse row. The neighbourhood is quiet and orderly.
state.bad: A neglected terrace. Paint peels from the facades and gutters are blocked.

condominium_building.default: A modern condominium building with a secure lobby.

state.good: A well-appointed condo building with an active owners' committee.
state.normal: A functional condominium building in a decent part of town.
state.bad: A condo building mired in maintenance disputes. The common areas show it.

senior_living_facility.default: A calm, residential facility for senior residents.

time.morning: Residents gather for morning exercise and breakfast.
time.afternoon: Afternoon activities fill the common room.
time.evening: The facility is settling down for a quiet evening.

state.good: A well-staffed, cheerful facility with a great range of activities.
state.normal: A decent senior living facility providing good basic care.
state.bad: An understaffed facility. The common areas are sad and the residents look lonely.

hotel_budget.default: A no-frills budget hotel offering a clean bed and little else.

time.morning: Guests check out in a hurry. The breakfast area smells of instant coffee.
time.evening: Weary travellers check in, dragging their bags to small rooms.
time.night: The corridors are quiet. Thin walls let in the sound of passing traffic.

state.good: A surprisingly tidy budget hotel that delivers on the basics.
state.normal: A standard budget hotel. You get what you pay for.
state.bad: A tired budget hotel. The carpet is worn and the plumbing unpredictable.

hotel_budget_room.default: A small, functional room with a single bed and a narrow window.

state.good: The room is compact but clean. Fresh linen and working Wi-Fi.
state.normal: A basic room. The mattress is firm and the walls thin.
state.bad: A cramped room. The air conditioning rattles and the curtains don't quite close.

hotel_business.default: A well-appointed business hotel catering to corporate travellers.

time.morning: Suited guests hurry through the lobby toward taxis and shuttles.
time.evening: Colleagues gather in the hotel bar after a day of meetings.
time.night: The hotel quiets. The lobby bar closes at midnight.

state.good: A sleek, efficiently run business hotel with excellent amenities.
state.normal: A solid business hotel meeting the needs of its corporate guests.
state.bad: A business hotel that has slipped. The service is slow and the décor dated.

hotel_business_room.default: A well-furnished room with a work desk and a king-size bed.

state.good: A spacious, well-equipped room. A bowl of fruit sits on the desk.
state.normal: A comfortable room with everything the business traveller needs.
state.bad: A room showing its age. The carpet is worn and the shower pressure weak.

hotel_luxury.default: A grand lobby of marble and gold greets you.

time.morning: White-gloved staff glide silently across the polished floor.
time.evening: Elegantly dressed guests fill the cocktail lounge.
time.night: The hotel hums with restrained opulence even at this late hour.

attribute.CHARISMA: You carry yourself with the ease of someone who belongs here.
attribute.PERCEPTION: You notice every exquisite detail of the craftsmanship around you.

state.good: A world-class luxury hotel at the height of its prestige.
state.normal: A premium luxury hotel delivering a polished, elegant experience.
state.bad: A luxury hotel resting on faded glory. The service is still good but the edge is gone.

hotel_luxury_room.default: An expansive suite with panoramic views and bespoke furnishings.

state.good: A flawlessly appointed suite. Fresh flowers, chilled champagne, city views.
state.normal: A beautiful suite with high-end finishes and impeccable housekeeping.
state.bad: A luxury suite that doesn't quite live up to the price. A few details disappoint.

office_building_small.default: A modest office building housing a handful of small businesses.

time.morning: Morning arrivals swipe badges and head to their floors.
time.afternoon: Meeting rooms hum with afternoon presentations.
time.evening: The building empties as workers head home.
time.night: Cleaning staff move through the quiet, darkened floors.

state.good: A well-maintained small office building with reliable utilities.
state.normal: A standard office building. The lifts work and the heating is adequate.
state.bad: An aging office block. The HVAC is temperamental and the lobby dingy.

office_building_medium.default: A mid-sized office block bustling with corporate activity.

time.morning: The lobby fills with badge-swiping professionals.
time.afternoon: A steady stream of visitors heads to and from meetings.
time.evening: Stragglers finishing late catch the last lift down.

state.good: A well-run office building with modern infrastructure.
state.normal: A functional office building serving its tenants competently.
state.bad: An office building showing maintenance fatigue. The air conditioning is uneven.

office_building_large.default: A large tower housing thousands of office workers.

time.morning: The rush-hour lift queue backs up into the lobby.
time.afternoon: The building hums with meetings, calls, and deadlines.
time.evening: Waves of workers spill out onto the street as the day ends.

state.good: A prestigious office tower with top-tier facilities.
state.normal: A major office building doing its job for its corporate tenants.
state.bad: A large office building stretched by deferred maintenance. The lobby is tired.

corporate_headquarters.default: The imposing HQ of a major corporation. Security is tight.

time.morning: Executives arrive by private car as security screens visitors.
time.afternoon: Boardroom blinds are drawn against the afternoon sun.
time.evening: A few determined executives remain as the building empties.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You absorb the strategic signage and corporate messaging instinctively.
attribute.CHARISMA: You project the confidence needed to move through these halls unchallenged.

state.good: A commanding corporate headquarters projecting power and success.
state.normal: A solid corporate HQ with the expected polish and security.
state.bad: A corporate headquarters under pressure — the shine has worn off.

coworking_space.default: Open desks, bean bags, and the smell of artisan coffee fill the space.

time.morning: Early freelancers claim the best spots.
time.afternoon: The space buzzes with laptop clatter and phone calls.
time.evening: The day crowd packs up. Evening members drift in.

state.good: A vibrant coworking space with fast Wi-Fi and great coffee.
state.normal: A functional coworking space. All the basics are covered.
state.bad: An oversubscribed coworking space. Finding a desk is a daily lottery.

strip_mall.default: A strip of small shops sharing a common car park.

time.morning: A few early shoppers grab necessities before work.
time.afternoon: The strip mall hits its peak with lunchtime shoppers.
time.evening: A few stores are still open as the others pull down their shutters.

state.good: A tidy strip mall with a good mix of thriving tenants.
state.normal: A standard strip mall. Some units are occupied, some aren't.
state.bad: A declining strip mall. Half the shops are shuttered.

shopping_center.default: A covered shopping complex with dozens of stores under one roof.

time.morning: Early shoppers stroll through the nearly empty concourse.
time.afternoon: The shopping centre buzzes with weekend crowds.
time.evening: Families make their way to the food court for dinner.

state.good: A thriving shopping centre with popular anchor stores and full occupancy.
state.normal: A solid shopping centre serving the local retail needs.
state.bad: A struggling shopping centre. Several units sit empty behind paper-covered glass.

regional_mall.default: A vast regional mall drawing shoppers from across the city.

time.morning: Mall walkers take their laps before the stores open.
time.afternoon: The mall reaches peak capacity. Every store is busy.
time.evening: The mall cinema draws the after-dinner crowd.

state.good: A dominant regional mall at the peak of its commercial power.
state.normal: A large, functional mall with most of its tenants thriving.
state.bad: A regional mall in decline. Anchor stores have departed and foot traffic has dropped.

supermarket.default: Broad aisles of food, drink, and household goods stretch before you.

time.morning: Early shoppers collect the freshest produce.
time.afternoon: The lunchtime crowd grabs meal deals.
time.evening: Families do their weekly shop after work.
time.night: A skeleton crew restocks shelves in the late-night quiet.

state.good: A well-stocked supermarket with fresh produce and fast checkouts.
state.normal: A standard supermarket. Everything you need is probably here.
state.bad: An understocked supermarket. Several shelves are bare and the produce isn't fresh.

warehouse_store.default: Towering shelving units stacked with bulk goods.

time.morning: Forklifts replenish stock in the early morning.
time.afternoon: Shoppers navigate wide aisles with oversized trolleys.

state.good: A well-run warehouse store with full stock and competitive prices.
state.normal: A functional warehouse store. Bring a big bag.
state.bad: A warehouse store struggling with stock shortages and long queues.

restaurant_casual.default: A relaxed restaurant with comfortable booths and a broad menu.

time.morning: The breakfast service is running smoothly.
time.afternoon: The lunch rush fills every table.
time.evening: The dinner crowd settles in for a long, leisurely meal.
time.night: Last orders are being taken as the kitchen winds down.

state.good: A popular restaurant with consistently good food and warm service.
state.normal: A pleasant casual restaurant. The food is solid and the service friendly.
state.bad: A restaurant that has lost its way. The menu is tired and the service slow.

restaurant_fine_dining.default: Soft lighting, crisp linen, and the quiet conversation of well-dressed diners.

time.evening: The evening service is in full flow. Somewhere a sommelier uncorks a bottle.
time.night: The last diners of the evening linger over dessert and wine.

attribute.CHARISMA: The maître d' greets you with particular warmth.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read the French menu with ease and order with confidence.

state.good: A Michelin-worthy establishment at the pinnacle of its art.
state.normal: A high-quality fine dining restaurant delivering a memorable experience.
state.bad: A fine dining restaurant past its prime. The portions have shrunk and the magic faded.

movie_theater.default: The smell of popcorn and the hum of anticipation fill the lobby.

time.afternoon: The afternoon matinée draws families and retirees.
time.evening: The blockbuster evening screenings are sold out.
time.night: The late-night show attracts a dedicated crowd.

state.good: A modern cinema with reclining seats and crystal-clear screens.
state.normal: A solid multiplex. The screens are clean and the sound is good.
state.bad: A dated cinema. The seats are worn and the projection inconsistent.

bowling_alley.default: The crash of pins and the squeak of rented shoes fill the hall.

time.afternoon: Afternoon league play has the lanes fully booked.
time.evening: The evening crowd brings out the competitive bowlers.
time.night: Glow-in-the-dark bowling is in full swing.

state.good: A well-maintained bowling alley with fast lane service.
state.normal: A solid bowling alley. The lanes are mostly straight and the balls unchipped.
state.bad: A tired bowling alley. The scoring system glitches and two lanes are closed.

nightclub.default: A wall of bass hits you as the door opens.

time.evening: The early birds are arriving as the night begins.
time.night: The club is in full swing. Lights strobe across packed bodies.

attribute.CHARISMA: You move through the crowd with easy confidence, drawing glances.
attribute.AGILITY: Your footwork on the dancefloor is effortless.

state.good: A thriving nightclub at the peak of its popularity.
state.normal: A solid nightclub with good music and a decent crowd.
state.bad: A nightclub in decline. The crowd is thin and the sound system crackles.

sports_arena.default: The roar of the crowd echoes through the concourse.

time.afternoon: The afternoon game has fans streaming through the turnstiles.
time.evening: The main event is underway. The atmosphere is electric.

attribute.STRENGTH: You appreciate the athleticism on display like few others could.
attribute.STAMINA: You wish you were down on the field.

state.good: A world-class arena delivering an unforgettable live sports experience.
state.normal: A solid sports venue with great sight lines and good atmosphere.
state.bad: An aging arena. The concession stands are understocked and the seats cramped.

warehouse_small.default: A small warehouse with stacked pallets and the smell of cardboard.

state.good: A well-organised small warehouse with efficient logistics.
state.normal: A functional small warehouse serving its purpose.
state.bad: A cluttered warehouse where things are rarely found quickly.

warehouse_large.default: An enormous warehouse with ceiling-high shelving units.

state.good: A masterclass in logistics. Every pallet is in its place.
state.normal: A large, busy warehouse keeping the supply chain moving.
state.bad: A chaotic warehouse. Forklifts idle while staff search for misplaced stock.

manufacturing_facility.default: The rhythmic clank of machinery fills the production floor.

time.morning: The day shift clocks in and the production lines power up.
time.evening: The night shift takes over as the day crew heads home.

state.good: A modern manufacturing facility with cutting-edge equipment.
state.normal: A functional factory keeping up with production targets.
state.bad: An aging facility. Breakdowns are frequent and maintenance is behind.

data_center.default: Row upon row of servers hum in the cool, air-conditioned interior.

attribute.INTELLIGENCE: The architecture of the systems around you makes perfect sense to you.
attribute.PERCEPTION: Your eyes catch details others would miss: cable routing, hardware generations.

state.good: A state-of-the-art data center with redundant power and impeccable security.
state.normal: A solid data center with acceptable uptime and standard security.
state.bad: An aging data center. Thermal management is a constant battle.

self_storage.default: Row upon row of orange roll-up doors line the long corridors.

time.morning: A few early arrivals wrestle furniture through their unit doors.
time.afternoon: The occasional visitor navigates the maze of corridors.

state.good: A clean, well-secured self-storage facility with 24-hour access.
state.normal: A functional self-storage site. Security is basic but adequate.
state.bad: A neglected storage facility. The lighting is poor and some locks are corroded.

church.default: The quiet interior invites calm reflection.

time.morning: Morning service draws the faithful through the heavy wooden doors.
time.afternoon: The church is peaceful, open for private prayer.
time.evening: Evening vespers echo through the nave.
time.night: The church is dark and locked, its stained glass dark.

state.good: A beautifully maintained church with an active and welcoming congregation.
state.normal: A solid parish church at the heart of its community.
state.bad: A struggling church. The roof needs repair and the congregation has dwindled.

mosque.default: The call to prayer lingers in the air.

time.morning: Fajr brings early worshippers to the mosque.
time.afternoon: Dhuhr draws a midday congregation.
time.evening: The evening prayers fill the hall with quiet devotion.

state.good: A well-maintained mosque with a welcoming and active community.
state.normal: A functioning mosque serving its local congregation.
state.bad: A mosque in need of repair. The community fundraises for renovations.

synagogue.default: The ornate interior reflects generations of tradition.

time.morning: Morning minyan gathers in the side chapel.
time.evening: Shabbat candles glow as the evening service begins.

state.good: A beautifully kept synagogue with a close-knit and vibrant community.
state.normal: A traditional synagogue observing its customs with quiet dignity.
state.bad: An aging synagogue. Repair costs strain the community budget.

hospital_small.default: The antiseptic smell of the hospital reaches you at the entrance.

time.morning: Morning rounds are underway. Nurses stride the corridors.
time.evening: Visiting hours bring families through the wards.
time.night: The night shift operates with practiced efficiency.

state.good: A well-staffed community hospital with good patient outcomes.
state.normal: A standard community hospital managing its workload competently.
state.bad: An overstretched hospital. Corridors are lined with beds and staff look exhausted.

hospital_large.default: A major hospital complex with bustling corridors and busy wards.

time.morning: Shift changes bring controlled chaos as the day begins.
time.afternoon: Outpatient clinics are in full swing.
time.evening: Visiting hours bring a fresh wave of family and friends.
time.night: The night team keeps the hospital running through the small hours.

state.good: A leading hospital at the cutting edge of medicine.
state.normal: A large, well-regarded hospital delivering consistent care.
state.bad: An overwhelmed major hospital. Waiting times are long and resources are stretched.

urgent_care.default: A walk-in clinic for ailments that can't wait for a scheduled appointment.

time.morning: Morning patients stream in with overnight complaints.
time.afternoon: The afternoon brings a steady flow of workplace injuries and minor emergencies.
time.evening: The evening rush after offices close.

state.good: A fast, efficient urgent care centre with short wait times.
state.normal: A solid urgent care clinic. You'll be seen within the hour.
state.bad: An overwhelmed urgent care centre. The waiting room is full and staff are frazzled.

car_dealership.default: Polished cars gleam under bright showroom lights.

time.morning: Salespeople are setting up for the day.
time.afternoon: Weekend browsers inspect the lot in the afternoon sunshine.
time.evening: Last-minute buyers hurry to close deals before closing time.

state.good: A thriving dealership with an excellent selection and pressure-free service.
state.normal: A standard dealership. The salespeople are attentive without being pushy.
state.bad: A struggling dealership. The lot is thinly stocked and the staff hungry for a deal.

auto_repair_shop.default: The smell of oil and the sound of air tools fill the workshop.

time.morning: Mechanics start work early, queuing cars on the forecourt.
time.afternoon: The afternoon session is in full swing.

state.good: A reputable garage with skilled mechanics and fair prices.
state.normal: A functional repair shop that gets the job done.
state.bad: A backstreet garage. You hope the repairs are as described.

transit_station.default: Commuters stream through the gates and onto the platform.

time.morning: Rush-hour crowds pack the platform to capacity.
time.afternoon: A moderate flow of daytime travellers.
time.evening: The evening rush brings jostling commuters.
time.night: Late-night services run sparse and the platform is eerily quiet.

state.good: A modern, well-maintained transit hub with reliable services.
state.normal: A functional transit station keeping the city moving.
state.bad: A worn-down station. Delays are frequent and the facilities are grubby.

security_shop.default: Cameras, locks, and surveillance equipment line the walls.

attribute.PERCEPTION: Your trained eye quickly identifies the highest-value equipment.
attribute.INTELLIGENCE: You read the technical specifications with ease.

state.good: A well-stocked security shop with expert, knowledgeable staff.
state.normal: A solid security and surveillance retailer.
state.bad: A poorly stocked security shop. The staff are unhelpful and the selection thin.

bus_depot.default: Buses pull in and out under the cavernous roof.

time.morning: Drivers begin their morning routes as the depot buzzes with activity.
time.evening: Buses return from their final runs as the day shift winds down.
time.night: The depot is quiet. A lone mechanic works under a raised bus.

state.good: A well-run bus depot with a modern fleet and reliable schedule.
state.normal: A functional bus depot keeping the city's public transport rolling.
state.bad: A struggling bus depot. Buses are old and breakdowns are common.

time.morning: The office is quiet in the early morning. You have it to yourself.
time.afternoon: The hum of the working day fills the space.
time.evening: Most of your colleagues have gone. You stay a little longer.
time.night: The building is nearly empty. You work by lamplight.

state.good: Your office is well-organised and everything is in order.
state.normal: Your office is as you left it. Papers stacked, computer waiting.
state.bad: Your office has seen better days. Papers pile up and the chair squeaks.
